channel.title: CHUGAO field notes
channel.description: Notes from the CHUGAO LED power supply factory in Zhongshan, China. Wattage, IP ratings, OEM tips, and what we see on the line.

item.title: Pick the right LED power supply in 3 steps
item.description: Wattage. IP rating. Input voltage. That is the short list.

item.title: IP20 vs IP65 vs IP67 vs IP68
item.description: What the numbers mean and where each one breaks down.

item.title: 2026 LED market: what we are seeing
item.description: Notes from the factory floor, not analyst reports.
